name: Toffee Bars # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, sugar, and flavorings thoroughly in a large bowl using an electric mixer.
2. Add flour and salt; mix well.
3. Stir in chocolate bits and nuts and spread evenly in an ungreased 15 x 10 x 1-inch jelly-roll pan. Ensure the edges of the dough are slightly thicker than the center to prevent them from browning more quickly.
4. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 1x2-inch bars and serving in an airtight container. These make delicious cookies that stay crisp.
